---
id: get-payment-methods
title: "Retrieve a list of payment methods based on filter values."
description: "This endpoint allows you to retrieve the available payment methods for a specific plugin, operation and customer. You can specify the desired filter field to get a list of payment methods that are supported and accessible."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve a list of payment methods based on filter values."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve a list of payment methods based on filter values."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/payment-methods/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint allows you to retrieve the available payment methods for a specific plugin, operation and customer. You can specify the desired filter field to get a list of payment methods that are supported and accessible.
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |
| [Basic Auth](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#basic-auth) | User-specific access based on assigned permissions |

> **Gateway permission**: `Can use pg_code` — grants access to the specific [payment gateway](/developers/payments/payment-methods/) (e.g., "Can use Credit Card")


<pre style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://ksa.ottu.dev/b/pbl/v2/payment-methods/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"plugin\": \"payment_request\",\n  \"operation\": \"purchase\",\n  \"currencies\": [\n    \"KWD\"\n  ],\n  \"type\": \"sandbox\",\n  \"tags\": [\n    \"demo\"\n  ]\n}'"}</pre>

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
